name: phase-13-area-edge-completion
goal: Make area: a first-class edge on meetings (leak/miss fix, propose-at-process, set-area, backfill under the inherited contract), ship the commitment claim verb, and finish the project-brief read surface so Phase 14 scans clean inputs.

userStories.title: AC1+AC10: meetingsForArea prefers explicit area:
userStories.description: Change brief-assemblers.ts:238 filter to per-meeting preference (m.area ? m.area===areaSlug : m.topics.includes(areaSlug)); doc comment update; leak/miss/trade-off fixtures.
acceptanceCriteria: Named test 'area-edge leak': area:pm-operations + topics:[glance-2-mvp] excluded from glance-2-mvp, included for pm-operations
Named test 'area-edge miss': area:pm-operations with no twin topic page included for pm-operations
Accepted-trade-off fixture: area:X + topics:[Y] EXCLUDED from Y (named, R4-bounded)
No-area meeting topics fallback unchanged; W6.2 meetingsForArea tests pass UNMODIFIED
typecheck + targeted tsx --test green

userStories.title: AC8: formatter polish (punch 7-9)
userStories.description: Status excerpt date-heading handling; renderSection indented-bullet passthrough; loadMeetingIndex excerpt skips HTML comments.
acceptanceCriteria: Status fixture renders **[YYYY-MM-DD]** prefix, no raw ### in output
Nested open-work bullets render '  - x' (no '-   - ' double-nest)
Body starting <!-- merged from --> yields next real line as excerpt
Cross-mode formatter regression: non-indented bullet output unchanged

userStories.title: AC7: jira frontmatter read-side
userStories.description: Parse fm.jira into ActiveProject + ProjectBrief.metadata.jira; formatter renders one **Jira:** line.
acceptanceCriteria: Object parsed; array values comma-joined; missing/malformed absent (no line, never throws)
Formatter renders line for jira:{idea: GL-12} fixture
No write path

userStories.title: AC4: siblings from area-union + archive prefix
userStories.description: Section-6 union: same-area actives first, link-derived extras deduped; archive lookup tolerates YYYY-MM_<slug>.
acceptanceCriteria: Area-siblings appear with zero README links
Link-only cross-area sibling still appears; self excluded; dedup works
Archived YYYY-MM_ dir resolves + labeled
Integration: 3 same-area projects each list the other 2

userStories.title: AC6: project skill prose
userStories.description: Always-show siblings/wiki + one-line absence note; broadened trigger list (load project, review project, look at project, load up).
acceptanceCriteria: Prose tests assert always-show rule text + broadened triggers in chef-orchestrator-skills.test.ts

userStories.title: SLICE A GATE: fixture gate + live shadow (MC3a)
userStories.description: Verify leak/miss tests; read-only section-count shadow over all live arete-reserv projects; record numbers in diary; STOP if any count changes.
acceptanceCriteria: Live brief section counts unchanged for every live project
arete-reserv git status byte-identical before/after
Gate numbers + verdict written to build-diary.md

userStories.title: D1: signal provenance on AreaMatch
userStories.description: Additive signal + corroborated fields on AreaMatch in area-parser.ts; no behavior change for existing consumers.
acceptanceCriteria: Unit tests per signal value + corroboration
Existing area-parser + consumer suites pass unmodified

userStories.title: AC3 core: meeting-area.ts helpers
userStories.description: listMeetingsForBackfill (skip area: carriers; inference text; alsoMatchesViaTopics; date), applyAreaToMeeting (writeWithLock mtimeGuard 0, same-values no-op suppression), resetBackfilledMeetingAreas (backfill-only), qualification policy (summary-only excluded, title-only nameOnly flag).
acceptanceCriteria: Candidate listing skips area: carriers
Apply preserves body bytes + other frontmatter incl. nested maps (real fs + StorageAdapter)
Same-values rerun = ZERO write calls (counting adapter)
Reset scoped to backfill; absent/manual/approval provenance untouched
Apply succeeds on freshly-written file (D4 regression)

userStories.title: AC3 CLI: arete meeting backfill-area
userStories.description: Preview default / --apply / --reset / --days / --skip-qmd / --json; name-only flagging grouped last + summary line; also-matches-via-topics column; unwritten surfaced.
acceptanceCriteria: Subprocess tests: preview/apply/reset/days/json paths
Preview leaves fixture workspace byte-identical (snapshotTree)
name-only flag + summary line in human output; signal/corroborated/alsoMatchesViaTopics in JSON
written:false surfaced as warning + unwritten count in JSON

userStories.title: AC2a: arete meeting set-area
userStories.description: set-area <file> <area-slug> --set-by approval|manual --json; area validated against areas/*.md; writeWithLock guard 0; abstain surfaced as error.
acceptanceCriteria: Round-trip preserves body + other frontmatter keys incl. nested maps
Unknown area slug = error, no write; --json all exit paths
set-area immediately after another write succeeds (D4 regression)

userStories.title: AC2b: proposal at meeting process + inheritance
userStories.description: proposedArea {slug,confidence,signal,corroborated} in process JSON + one human line at >=0.7; null below floor; zero area writes; integration process->set-area->approve inheritance.
acceptanceCriteria: Proposal present >=0.7 / absent <0.7
Process writes no area: key (asserted)
Integration: created commitments carry the area after set-area before approve

userStories.title: AC2c: process-meetings skill prose
userStories.description: Present proposal from process output; confirm-or-skip optional never-blocking; set-area BEFORE approve.
acceptanceCriteria: Prose tests pin propose-not-auto-write + optional-never-blocking + set-area-before-approve

userStories.title: AC5a: CommitmentsService.setProjectSlug
userStories.description: setProjectSlug(idPrefix, slug|null) with resolve() prefix semantics under existing lock; null clears.
acceptanceCriteria: Set, clear, ambiguous-prefix rejection, unknown-id error
Hash-invariance pinned: projectSlug stamp/clear leaves dedup hash/ID unchanged

userStories.title: AC5b: arete commitments claim CLI
userStories.description: claim <id-prefix> --project <slug> / --clear / --json; project validated against active/ + archive/ both naming shapes.
acceptanceCriteria: Subprocess: claim/clear/--json; unknown project rejected, no write
Integration: claim flips commitment from sibling unclaimed-area to project-claimed

userStories.title: Wrap: AC9/AC10/AC11
userStories.description: Full suite + typecheck; dark-code audit; dist rebuild + commit; cli-commands.md + AGENTS.md + capabilities.json + routability; rollback.md; memory entry + LEARNINGS; LOC ledger; ship report (stop 5.5).
acceptanceCriteria: Full npm test green; typecheck clean
Dark-code audit: 0 unexplained dark exports
rollback.md present; ledger vs ~+685 with variance notes
dist/ rebuilt and committed
